titles.title: We Will Glorify the King of Kings

authors.author: Twila Paris
Twila Paris
Wir verehren den, der mächtig ist

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We will glorify the King of kings We will glorify the Lamb We will glorify the Lord of lords Who is the great I am

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord Jehovah reigns in majesty We will bow before His throne We will worship Him in righteousness We will worship Him alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will glorify the King of kings We will glorify the Lamb We will glorify the Lord of lords Who is the great I am

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is Lord of Heaven, Lord of Earth He is Lord of all who live He is Lord above the universe All praise to Him we give

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, hallelujah to the King of kings Hallelujah to the Lamb Hallelujah to the Lord of Lords Who is the great I am

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We will glorify the King of kings We will glorify the Lamb We will glorify the Lord of lords Who is the great I am Who is the great I am
